content: Comparative performance differences between ICM, RND, and hand-crafted curious agents can be explained by unaccounted-for variations in how each agent architecture allocates working memory to episodic memory traces of unexplored state space, creating a hidden memory bottleneck that determines intrinsic reward calibration rather than the intrinsic reward mechanism itself.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
